article.title: [Offer Accepted 🎉 | Compensation Update – Uber L4]
article.content:
**I’m thrilled to share that I’ll be joining Uber soon! 🎉**

After **3 years of experience** in the industry, it’s been a challenging but rewarding journey—balancing a full-time role, upskilling, and staying consistent with problem-solving. Excited for this next chapter! 🙌




🏢 Current
```
Company: Big Indian PBC
Role: SDE-2
Base: ₹32,00,000
Bonus: ₹10,00,000
Stocks: ₹30,00,000 over 4 years
```

🚀 Offered
```
Company: Uber
Role: SDE-2
Base: ₹45,00,000
PF: ₹2,20,000
Bonus: ₹7,00,000 (can go up to 2x based on performance)
Stocks: ~$50,000 over 4 years (vested monthly)
Other Benefits: Uber credits, wellness perks, health insurance, and more
```

Super excited about what’s ahead! Happy to connect with anyone who's made a similar move or has any questions about the process. 😊

If you'd like to connect, feel free to share your LinkedIn, and I’ll send an invitation!

post.content: Congratulations!\n(bruh if you haven\'t disclosed your name, then how will we find you on LinkedIn)
Congratulation are in order... Please share interview experience and questions and key points the interviewer focused on that will help us prep too... thanks and Huge congrats again !!
How to connect? Can you share your interview experience.
Congrats but what\'s the point of sharing offer details without providing any interview experience?
Congratulations Bro, (if you are comfortable Can you help us know the interview topics we need to go through)
Congrats buddy! can we connect https://linkedin.com/in/sahilmandoliya
